prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait in a 4:5 vertical aspect ratio. A young Black male model with short close-cropped black hair and smooth skin sits confidently on a modern black chair in a studio. He wears a perfectly tailored glossy deep crimson red two-piece suit with a fitted blazer and slim trousers, a crisp white dress shirt, a dark navy tie, black dress socks, and polished black leather oxford shoes. His pose is relaxed and composed: body angled slightly toward camera, legs spread naturally, one forearm draped over the chair back with the hand hanging down, the other hand resting on his thigh, shoulders squared, direct calm gaze into the lens, neutral serious expression. Use a seamless deep red studio backdrop and matching glossy floor with subtle reflections. Lighting should feel like a premium fashion campaign: soft frontal key light, gentle highlights on the suit fabric, controlled shadows, sharp facial detail, realistic skin texture, clean tailoring lines, high-end editorial styling. Frame as a full-body seated portrait with the chair fully visible, centered slightly left, no props beyond the chair, no text, no watermark, photorealistic studio photography, polished magazine-cover quality.
